Designing made easy with tools you already love. Discover and try new apps to unleash your creative productivity.

Design with your favorite media

AI Music

Custom music for your designs

FontFrame

Create vibrant text with image backgrounds

Google Drive

Access your Google Drive files in Canva

Crop your images in custom shapes

Google Photos

Add media from Google Photos to your designs

Image Upscaler

Seamlessly upscale images

TypeCutOut

Transform your text with background images

Gen QR

Design vibrant QR codes

Reface

AI-powered face swap app for unique portraits

Brandfetch

Search and add brand logos to your design

CanBorder

Create borders for your designs

Enhance your images

FontStudio

Advanced text effect studio

Image Blender

Effortlessly merge or blend images in Canva

TypeExtrude

Add depth and dimension to your text

Pixelify

Make your images look pixelated

TypeGradient

Add gradients to texts

Lottie Animations

World’s largest customizable animation library

Animeify

Transform your photos into stunning anime art

Sketchify

Turns your photos into hand-drawn sketches

Image Splitter

Create seamless carousels and grids

TypeLettering

Customizable text effects for captivating designs.

Equations

Build equations easily, insert them into designs

Meta Design Check

Shopify Connect

Activities Maker

Instagram

Google Maps

Bingo Cards

Calendar Maker

CreatEcards

Heyzine Flipbooks

Page turn effects and slideshows for your design

Amazon Creators
